note: PD-L1 hotspot residue lists for PyMOL rendering. Each list is a different selection rule. The strict_10 list is the canonical structural interface (≤3.5 Å min atom-atom distance to chain B in 4ZQK).

strict_10.rule: all chain A residues with min_atom_atom_distance ≤ 3.5 Å to chain B in 4ZQK
strict_10.use_for: general PyMOL visualization — full structural interface

top_5_strict.rule: top 5 by closest distance (sorted: A122 2.557, A125 2.613, A113 2.645, A121 2.678, A123 2.699 Å)
top_5_strict.use_for: RFdiffusion ppi.hotspot_res steering — 3-5 is the sweet spot

literature_5.use_for: publication-quality renders that match original PD-L1 / PD-1 papers
